# go-term benchmark baseline
# go test -bench=. -count=10 -benchmem ./term
# Each line: Name  NsPerOp  BytesPerOp  AllocsPerOp
BenchmarkVisualReorder_FullRow 17431 22552 69
BenchmarkVisualReorder_AllLTR 723 0 0
BenchmarkSixel_Decode 23529 49344 5
BenchmarkGrid_InsertLines 1171 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_DeleteLines 931 0 0
BenchmarkResize_Reflow_DeepScrollback 29772012 90451218 31155
BenchmarkGrid_ScrollUpRegion_FullScreen 1712 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_ScrollDownRegion_FullScreen 2163 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search 84132 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search_LargeScrollback 11962 24 1
BenchmarkParserFeed_PlainText 103822 0 0
BenchmarkParserFeed_SGR 51681 0 0
BenchmarkScrollback_EnsureGeom 379292 2893312 4
BenchmarkForegroundPass 75141 0 0
